'''fowavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quacky|quacky]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quacky|quacky]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fowavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fowavithi|fowavithi]] || [[word:fowaviji|fowaviji]] || [[word:fowavishi|fowavishi]] || [[word:fowaviki|fowaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fowavuthuthu|fowavuthuthu]] || [[word:fowavujuju|fowavujuju]] || [[word:fowavushushu|fowavushushu]] || [[word:fowavukuku|fowavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fowavuthu|fowavuthu]] || [[word:fowavuju|fowavuju]] || [[word:fowavushu|fowavushu]] || [[word:fowavuku|fowavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fowavufthuf|fowavufthuf]] || [[word:fowavufjuf|fowavufjuf]] || [[word:fowavufshuf|fowavufshuf]] || [[word:fowavufkuf|fowavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fowavethe|fowavethe]] || [[word:fowaveje|fowaveje]] || [[word:fowaveshe|fowaveshe]] || [[word:fowaveke|fowaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fowavothotho|fowavothotho]] || [[word:fowavojojo|fowavojojo]] || [[word:fowavoshosho|fowavoshosho]] || [[word:fowavokoko|fowavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fowavotho|fowavotho]] || [[word:fowavojo|fowavojo]] || [[word:fowavosho|fowavosho]] || [[word:fowavoko|fowavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fowavofthof|fowavofthof]] || [[word:fowavofjof|fowavofjof]] || [[word:fowavofshof|fowavofshof]] || [[word:fowavofkof|fowavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfthÃŸf|fowavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfjÃŸf|fowavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfshÃŸf|fowavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfkÃŸf|fowavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fowavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fowavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fowavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fowavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfthÃŸf|fowavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfjÃŸf|fowavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfshÃŸf|fowavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfkÃŸf|fowavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfthÃŸf|fowavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfjÃŸf|fowavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfshÃŸf|fowavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fowavÃŸfkÃŸf|fowavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fowavÃḊthÃḊ|fowavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fowavÃḊjÃḊ|fowavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fowavÃḊshÃḊ|fowavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fowavÃḊkÃḊ|fowavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fowavathatha|fowavathatha]] || [[word:fowavajaja|fowavajaja]] || [[word:fowavashasha|fowavashasha]] || [[word:fowavakaka|fowavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fowavatha|fowavatha]] || [[word:fowavaja|fowavaja]] || [[word:fowavasha|fowavasha]] || [[word:fowavaka|fowavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fowavafthaf|fowavafthaf]] || [[word:fowavafjaf|fowavafjaf]] || [[word:fowavafshaf|fowavafshaf]] || [[word:fowavafkaf|fowavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fowavasha|fowavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fowavshÃḋsha|fowavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fowavrosha|fowavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fowavmusha|fowavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fowavyasha|fowavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofowavnkshÃḋsha|gofowavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofowavnkrosha|gofowavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofowavnkmusha|gofowavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofowavnkyasha|gofowavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fowawavasha|fowawavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fowawavshÃḋsha|fowawavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fowawavrosha|fowawavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fowawavmusha|fowawavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fowawavyasha|fowawavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofowawavnkshÃḋsha|gofowawavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofowawavnkrosha|gofowawavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofowawavnkmusha|gofowawavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofowawavnkyasha|gofowawavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fewÃḊvasha|fewÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fewÃḊvshÃḋsha|fewÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fewÃḊvrosha|fewÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fewÃḊvmusha|fewÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fewÃḊvyasha|fewÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofewÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|gofewÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofewÃḊvnkrosha|gofewÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofewÃḊvnkmusha|gofewÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofewÃḊvnkyasha|gofewÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fowfavasha|fowfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fowfavshÃḋsha|fowfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fowfavrosha|fowfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fowfavmusha|fowfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fowfavyasha|fowfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofowfavnkshÃḋsha|gofowfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofowfavnkrosha|gofowfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofowfavnkmusha|gofowfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofowfavnkyasha|gofowfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
